checks.name: launch-mode-contract
checks.detail: Installer types, CLI parsing, TUI flow, and install execution now carry an explicit launch mode contract for `local`, `docker`, `manual`, and `skip`.

checks.name: docker-launch-execution
checks.detail: Docker launch validates `docker compose version`, checks daemon availability with `docker info`, runs Compose config and startup, and records structured command and health results.

checks.name: compose-env-file-runtime-fix
checks.detail: Controlled runtime proof showed host-port overrides were ignored without `--env-file .env`; installer and docs now use the corrected Compose command form and the post-fix config artifact shows published high ports from `.env`.

checks.name: host-daemon-separation
checks.detail: Compose startup remains limited to the packaged control-plane stack; host-daemon pairing and startup stay explicit manual steps outside Compose.

checks.name: port-preflight-miniapp-semantics
checks.detail: Port preflight still runs before Docker launch, persists `HAPPYTG_*_PORT` overrides, preserves the Mini App internal listener at `3001`, and keeps the host-port mapping configurable.

checks.name: verification
checks.detail: Scoped bootstrap checks and fresh repo-wide test/typecheck/build/lint all passed after the final fix. `doctor`/`verify` still report unrelated local-environment issues, and task validation now reports the bundle as complete/passed.
